projectDescription: An open-source collection of AI Skills by Khazix, following the Agent Skills open standard to extend AI agent capabilities with structured, composable instruction sets.
keyFeatures: Structured AI Skill format following the Agent Skills open standard
Composable and portable skills that work across AI tools (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw)
Khazix Writer: WeChat long-form article writing skill with full style rules
Four-layer self-check quality system (L1-L4) for article review
HKR topic validation method (Happy, Knowledge, Resonance)
Five article archetypes with specific writing strategies
Curated style examples library with AI vs. human comparison
Content methodology including topic sourcing and creative case development
publicApiSurface: khazix-writer skill (trigger: writing WeChat long-form articles)
Four-layer self-check system (L1: hard rules, L2: style consistency, L3: content quality, L4: human feel)
Five article archetypes: investigative-experiment, product-experience, phenomenon-analysis, tool-sharing, methodology-sharing
